programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Go Protein
programme.desc: Guest chef Eugene Hamilton from Euro restaurant joins MasterChef judges to cook 3 protein-packed main courses.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Baking
programme.desc: The Top 10 contestants bake a sponge cake for guest chef Natalie Oldfield.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Baking Bonanza
programme.desc: Guest chef Sean Armstrong from Auckland bakery Loaf joins MasterChef judges to bake three delicious desserts.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Around the World
programme.desc: Guest chef Sergio Maglione from Toto restaurant joins MasterChef judges to cook dishes from around the world.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Dolphin Island
programme.desc: The Top Eight contestants face an invention test at Dolphin Island resort in Fiji.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Cooking With Fire
programme.desc: Guest chef Michel Louws joins MasterChef judges to cook three barbecue dishes at Dolphin Island resort in Fiji.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Turduckenqua
programme.desc: The Top Seven contestants tackle a Turduckenqua–quail stuffed inside chicken, inside duck, inside turkey.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Old School Classics
programme.desc: Guest chef Martin Bosley joins MasterChef judges to cook three classic main courses.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Wither Hills Vineyard Barbecue
programme.desc: The Top Six contestants compete in a barbecue challenge at Wither Hills vineyard in Marlborough.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Vineyard Barbecue
programme.desc: Guest chef Rex Morgan joins the MasterChef judges for a barbecue at Wither Hills vineyard in Marlborough.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Dessert and Cocktail
programme.desc: The Top Five contestants must replicate an intricate dessert created by Christchurch chef Andrew Brown.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Just Dessert
programme.desc: Guest chefs Andrew Brown and Natalie Oldfield join Josh Emett to create three stunning desserts.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Ultimate Invention Test
programme.desc: The Top Four contestants must each invent a dish for guest chef Ben Bayly.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Mothers Of Invention
programme.desc: Guest chef Ben Bayly joins the MasterChef judges to invent three delicious main courses.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - French Cafe and Degustation
programme.desc: The top three contestants cook a six-course degustation meal at The French Café.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Signature Dish
programme.desc: In the season’s final Masterclass, Josh Emett, Simon Gault and Ray McVinnie cook three signature dishes.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Grand Final
programme.desc: The two finalists face four epic challenges to decide who will win the MasterChef New Zealand title.

programme.title: MasterChef New Zealand Season 04 - Jetstar Around The World
programme.desc: The Top Nine contestants must each cook a dish from nine different Jetstar airline destinations.

programme.title: Immunity Challenge: Dan Hong
programme.desc: Ben battles against celebrity chef Dan Hong in the first immunity pin challenge of the season.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Auditions
programme.desc: Hundreds of hopeful contestants compete for a place in the Top 50.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Top 50: Mornington Peninsula Challenge
programme.desc: The top 12 performers from the Mystery Box challenge travel to the Mornington Peninsula.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Top 50: Salmon Challenge
programme.desc: The remaining contestants are given the choice to compete for one of five spots in the Top 24.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Top 50: Pressure Test
programme.desc: In their first Pressure Test, Shannon Bennett brings a twist on the classic Peach Melba.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Masterclass 1
programme.desc: The top 18 contestants travel to Daylesford Lake House for their first MasterClass with Alla Wolf-Tasker.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Top 50: Elimination Challenge - French Cuisine
programme.desc: The remaining twelve hopefuls faced a French Invention Test set by Jacques Reymond at Montsalvat.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Top 24: Mystery Box
programme.desc: The Top 24 contestants enter the MasterChef Australia kitchen for their first mystery box challenge.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP16
programme.desc: A Minnesota teacher tries to chalk up a win. Then a part-time bartender from Massachusetts plays, hoping to tap into some cash to open a bar.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP17
programme.desc: Tis the season for a potential million-dollar Christmas. In holiday-themed games, a family from California steps up to play, as does a newly married war hero from Oregon.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP18
programme.desc: A coach from Tennessee tries to score $1 million. Then, a makeup artist from Texas pursues the top prize.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP19
programme.desc: A female drag racer from California revs up to play for the $1 million prize, as does a vivacious farmer-grandmother from Iowa.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP20
programme.desc: A farmer-grandmother from Iowa returns to finish her game. In addition, a Missouri musician tries to hit all the right notes in his bid for the $1 million prize.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP21
programme.desc: A New Jersey workingman plays for big bucks.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP22
programme.desc: 4 contestants, from Ohio, Connecticut and 2 from California - battle it out in a special speed game.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP1
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP2
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP5
programme.desc: Contestants get a chance to win money, from one penny to $1 million.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP11
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game. (11 out of 39)

programme.title: Deal or No Deal USA - EP12
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep, if they choose, until its unsealing at the end of the game. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game. (12 out of 39)

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Offsite Challenge: King's Cross
programme.desc: In their first Team Challenge, contestants took over the running of two of King's Cross best restaurants.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Elimination Challenge: Pasta
programme.desc: In a three-round pasta-themed challenge, the Red Team fight for their places in the competition.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Masterclass 2
programme.desc: Gary and George demonstrate some seafood recipes for the contestants.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - EP13
programme.desc: In the Mystery Box challenge, contestants are faced with a range of ingredients that have to be "cracked".

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Pressure Test: Peter Gilmore
programme.desc: Star chef Peter Gilmore sets the bottom three contestants a Pressure Test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Immunity Challenge: 3 Blue Ducks
programme.desc: Mindy faces professional chef Darren Robertson in an immunity pin challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Offsite Challenge: Yum Cha
programme.desc: The top 22 contestants head to Sydney's Chinese Gardens to compete in a yum cha challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Elimination Challenge: Tagine
programme.desc: The losing team must identify the 25 ingredients in a North African tagine.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Masterclass 3
programme.desc: Gary and Matt Moran host a MasterClass where they explore raw foods, herbs, and oils.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Mystery Box: Biscuits & Invention Test: Mexican
programme.desc: In a Mexican-themed Invention Test Julia chooses a cactus and a prickly pear as the core ingredient.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Pressure Test: Maggie Beer
programme.desc: Kath, Andrew and Julia were faced with the task of reproducing Maggie Beer's Upside Down Grape Cake.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - mmunity Challenge: Shaun Presland
programme.desc: Mindy goes up against Sake head chef Shaun Presland in a Raw Food Immunity challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Offsite Challenge: Leftovers
programme.desc: The teams were tasked with creating a three-course fundraising dinner for charity organisation OzHarvest.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Elimination Challenge: Poultry
programme.desc: A Red Team elimination challenge begins with a "name that bird" round.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Masterclass 4
programme.desc: Gary begins another MasterClass with his recipe for barbecue chicken.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Mystery Box: Flavour Matching & Invention Test: Seduction
programme.desc: The mystery box challenge features a number of seemingly disparate ingredients.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Offsite Challenge: Salamanca Market
programme.desc: Tasmania Week begins with a four-team Market Stall Challenge, which took place at Salamanca Markets.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Immunity Challenge: Fishing For Salmon Challenge & Philippe Leban
programme.desc: The winning team members cook off for the right to compete in an immunity challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Offsite Challenge: Afternoon Tea
programme.desc: Contestants are split into 2 teams and are tasked with hosting afternoon tea for 100 guests.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Elimination Challenge: Pub Lunch
programme.desc: Nine contestants on the losing team face elimination challenges that include three knockout rounds.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Masterclass 5
programme.desc: In a masterclass edition, Gary cooks a succulent roasted pork rack with braised vegetables.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Mystery Box & Seafood from Around the World with Rick Stein
programme.desc: In the Mystery Box challenge, contestants are given a single egg and asked to make it the hero of their dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia Season 04 - Elimination Challenge: Greek Salad
programme.desc: Characters: 0 | Words: 0 Dalvinder, Audra and Andrew are given 3.5 hours to reproduce George's 'Greek Salad'.

programme.title: Fear Factor USA - EP8
programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Fear Factor USA - EP9
programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Fear Factor USA - EP10
programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - The Bees Are So Angry
programme.desc: Five teams of two compete for $100,000 dollars on a five stunt, 2 hour spectacular.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Leeches & Shaved Heads & Tear Gas
programme.desc: In a special 2 hour Fear Factor five teams of 2 are bungeed off a cliff while tied under a helicopter.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA - Snake Bite
programme.desc: Four couples compete for a grand prize of $50,000.

programme.desc: Fear Factor is the competition reality series in which contestants must face their fears.
